recommendedConcept.title: Local hidden gem for Nook & Pour
recommendedConcept.hook: POV: you found the Tel Aviv spot that makes weekdays feel lighter.
recommendedConcept.caption: Your weekday reset in Tel Aviv. Save this for your next coffee-work break.
recommendedConcept.executionStyle: Warm, quick-cut, phone-shot vertical video with natural light, close product details, and one staff/customer human moment.
scenePlan: 0-2s: Open on the strongest visual: coffee pour, pastry close-up, or quiet table reveal.
2-7s: Show the problem: busy weekday, laptop open, viewer needs a small reset.
7-18s: Show Nook & Pour solving it with atmosphere, product, and one human moment.
18-25s: Add a simple reason to visit this week.
25-30s: End with a soft call to action and location cue.
shotList: Exterior or street sign establishing shot
Final table spread with location text overlay

failureNotes: 5 social source(s) were retained as metadata-only because the public page had limited scrapeable text.
tradeoff: Defaulted to Bright Data MCP free-tier tools for reproducibility. Pro/social extractors would improve structured TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, and Reddit metadata in production.
nextSteps: Open the top evidence links and manually review the visual format before posting.
Film a 20-35 second vertical version with the hook in the first two seconds.
Post the same concept to TikTok and Instagram Reels, then compare saves, comments, and profile visits.
Rerun the agent weekly to avoid stale trend copying.
